title: Create Trains + CustomPortalAPI (1.20.1)
description: Allows trains from Create Mod to enter portals created via CustomPortalAPI.
body:
# IN ITS CURRENT STATE, THIS MOD BREAKS NETHER PORTALS. A FIX IS NOT PLANNED.

This mod allows Create Mod trains to travel between portals constructed via the Custom Portal API. 

Much like in the Nether, placing a rail at the front of a portal will bridge between the entrance and exit. 

This mod is a great option for those trying to bring Create Mod compatibility to dimension mods that rely on Custom Portal API, or for those who want to make a Custom Portal API version of an existing portal that can't be entered by Create trains (e.g. The End or Twilight Forest)

This is based entirely on [TheRobbie72's Create Trains and Custom Portal API Integration mod for 1.18.2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-trains-and-custom-portal-api-integration), so huge credits to them! 

![A Create train entering the Twilight Forest through a CustomPortalAPI portal](https://fileserver.gloobert.net/public/input.gif)
